description: Scans all script configs, specs, and suggestions for stale IDs or renumbering inconsistencies.

messages.notAdmin: This script does not require admin privileges -- running anyway.
messages.allPassed: All checks passed -- project is consistent.
messages.someFailures: Some checks failed -- review the output above.

commands.audit -Fix: Run checks and auto-fix broken/missing symlinks
commands.audit -DryRun: Preview which symlinks -Fix would repair (no changes made)
commands.audit -Report: Run checks and save a JSON health report to logs/
